name: tios
description: Thermal Inspection Operating System - No Database Edition

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "FE,BE,BRG,PIPE" -c "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "python backend/drone_bridge.py" "python backend/python/main.py --simulation"
